ddls:
CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain name of the website */,
  "admin_email" TEXT /* Email address of the website administrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the website was added to the platform */,
  "website_status" TEXT /* Current status of the website (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the website's data was updated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the website */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the website is hosted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the session occurred on */,
  "ip_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IP address associated with the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (if user authentication is implemented) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "referrer_url" TEXT /* URL that referred the user to the website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_ip_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("ip_address_id") REFERENCES ip_addresses ("ip_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_addresses" (
  "ip_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the IP is resolved */,
  "resolved_name" TEXT /* Resolved name or description of the IP address */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Last time the IP address was seen */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the IP address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City associated with the IP address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the IP address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the IP address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page view event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the page was viewed */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page being viewed */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the page was viewed during the session */,
  "view_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the page view */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (if user authentication is implemented) */,
  "referring_page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page that referred the user to the current page */,
  "exit_page" INTEGER /* Indicates if the page was the last page in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_views_referring_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("referring_page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_views_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_views_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the page belongs to */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page */,
  "page_title" TEXT /* Title of the page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the page was created */,
  "page_status" TEXT /* Current status of the page (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the page was modified */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of page (e.g., blog, product, about us) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the page (e.g., keywords, description) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pages_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hits" (
  "hit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hit event */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page being hit */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the page was hit */,
  "hit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the page was hit during the session */,
  "hit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the hit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (if user authentication is implemented) */,
  "hit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the hit in seconds */,
  "hit_type" TEXT /* Type of hit (e.g., click, scroll, form submission) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hits_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hits_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bandwidth_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bandwidth usage event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the bandwidth was used */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Amount of bandwidth used in MB */,
  "usage_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the bandwidth usage */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (if user authentication is implemented) */,
  "download_bandwidth" REAL /* Amount of download bandwidth used in MB */,
  "upload_bandwidth" REAL /* Amount of upload bandwidth used in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bandwidth_usage_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of the role (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
